headline: Delta Air Lines Weighs Fuel Cost Pressures Against Premium And Loyalty Strength
summary: Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) is facing higher operating costs driven by a sharp rise in jet fuel prices. The company is leaning on its loyalty program, premium products, and fee and capacity adjustments to help offset these pressures. These moves are affecting how Delta prices tickets and allocates seats between premium and main cabin travel. Delta operates as a full service global carrier, with a large US and international network and a sizable premium cabin and corporate travel presence...

headline: Evercore ISI Increases Delta (DAL) PT, Adjusts Airline Coverage Outlook
summary: Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) is included among the 10 Fastest Growing Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. On April 17, Duane Pfennigwerth of Evercore ISI raised the firm’s price recommendation on Delta Air Lines, Inc. (NYSE:DAL) to $85 from $80. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm updated its estimates across airline […]
